description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default runner image with no services. Define a single job named test in the default stage. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update and installs wget, tar, unzip, openjdk-7-jdk, lib32stdc++6 and lib32z1, downloads android-sdk.tgz, extracts it, updates the Android SDK with platform-tools, tools, build-tools-22.0.1, android-22 and extra-android-m2repository, downloads gradle-2.12-bin.zip, unzips it, and sets ANDROID_HOME to the extracted SDK directory. In the test job script execute gradle-2.12/bin/gradle build. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
